title: Monster-brother
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|brother}}
[[File:Brotherevil.jpg|thumb|250px]]
'''Monster-brother''' was the term given by [[Cody Sunn-Childe]] to the psychic external manifestations of his violent passions.

==History==
He let them roam free in the jungles of the [[Kingdom of Dreams]] so that he could maintain inner peace. When some of the beasts were provoked into violence by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], Sunn-Childe was forced to reabsorb them into himself.

Later, Captain [[Plikk]]'s attack caused Cody to lose his temper, releasing the monster-brothers as giant demons which attacked the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 46}} {{1st}}
